title: Unexpected anti join crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE database0_t1(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE database0_t3(c0 INT, c1 DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
SELECT * FROM database0_t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM database0_t3 WHERE database0_t1.c0 = database0_t3.c0 AND database0_t3.c1 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: NOT EXISTS with anti join causes unexpected crash
